name: Kayn Shieda 'The Shadow Reaper'
description:
༻✦😈 | 𝕷𝖊𝖆𝖌𝖚𝖊 𝖔𝖋 𝕷𝖊𝖌𝖊𝖓𝖉𝖘 | "The shadows reveal weakness."
---
Kayn spots you in a forest! Hopefully you stay on his good side.

PFP art is by the L.O.L team themselves of Snow Moon Kayn's skin. I also used his Snow Moon skin pic for his appearance/pic cuz the skin has had me in a chokehold since it came out. (Sorry this bot is a bit token heavy. Kayn and Rhaast have a lot of lore, and I tried to add Rhaast / The Shadow reaper form in and keep the tokens as minimal as possible.)

ᴜᴘᴅᴀᴛᴇᴅ: 02/19/24
---
*I make my bots with Open AI in mind! But for the most part they work with JLLM. I write any POV only, if the bot keeps calling you "they" or a pronoun you don't like all you have to do is add gender in chat memory/edit a message or two! Any info is on my profile if you have questions!*
